title: Milestone Camping 62440 Enamel Travel Plate | Ideal for Camping, Hiking, Fishing, Travels & More | 24cm | Black Colour | Perfect for Lunches, Dinners & Snacks
features: TRAVEL PLATE – This heavy duty, enamel coated travel plate is the perfect addition to your essential items for camping, hiking and fishing trips, or to be used in the garden or on days out for picnics and BBQ’s.

SOLID CONSTRUCTION – This plate is manufactured from heavy duty metal, and features a stylish black enamel coating that adds to the overall durability of the product. The plate is not only brilliant for lunches and dinners, but can also be used to serve snacks and fruits too.

PERFECT SIZE – The plate measures 24cm (8in), allowing it to fit comfortably in rucksacks for your travels & camping trips, or picnic baskets if you’re having an afternoon outside or in the local park.
EASY CLEAN – The metal material is easy to clean, but can only be handwashed, and never put in the dishwasher. Once clean simply store away in your kitchen cupboards until your next great adventure!

MILESTONE CAMPING – Milestone Camping is the leading manufacturer of everything you need to enjoy the great outdoors. From tents and sleeping bags, to chairs and camp cutlery, visit the Milestone Camping page on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: Product Description Durable, Lightweight and Versatile Enamel Camping Cookware Enjoy meals in comfort while outdoors using these pieces of Enamel-Layered Metal Cookware. Travel mugs, plates, and bowls are available, all of which are made from sturdy materials while remaining lightweight and portable. Each piece of cookware is easy to clean via hand washing, and is designed to take up little space in a backpack. Previous page Eat & Drink Anywhere The heavy-duty enamel-layered material means these pieces of crockery can be used anywhere outdoors. Hot & Cold Temperatures Enjoy hot tea or cold water in the mug, as well as hot or cold dinners with the plate and bowl. Portable Design The mug, bowl, and plate have diameters of 12cm, 15cm, and 24cm respectively, making transport easy. Easy Cleaning Wherever you go, the dishes and mugs can all easily be cleaned by hand washing, nothing else needed. Sleek Design The enamel coating brings with it a sleek black colour which makes the cookware stand out.
